summary: Dashboard header layout, greeting polish, weather loading fixes, and website share icon.

changed: Live Nucleus resource usage sits in the Dashboard header between Today's weather and Cloud sync
Daily quote flows naturally from the greeting — Good morning, Iman! May every routine bring you wise laughter
Website link previews use the Nucleus app icon when sharing nucleus.suherman.net
fixed: Today's weather no longer stays on Loading forever when WeatherKit returns an error
Weather fetch retries are debounced so dashboard refreshes do not restart failed lookups in a loop
Weather error messages appear instead of a spinner when the forecast cannot load
